name: carboncraft
description: Production-grade toolkit for building Next.js 15 web UIs with IBM Carbon Design System: setup, theming, chat UI, dashboards, forms, state management, observability, and OpenShift deployment.

plugins.name: carboncraft
plugins.description: 9 specialised skills covering the complete Carbon frontend development lifecycle — from tooling setup and Next.js App Router architecture through Carbon design system integration, chat UI, dashboards, form validation, Zustand state management, OpenTelemetry observability, and OpenShift deployment.
